title: SamplingConfig
description: Sampling configuration types for the profiler.

profileSampleType.description: Type of Profile Sample (percentage or rows)

samplingMethodType.description: Type of Sampling Method (BERNOULLI or SYSTEM)

staticSamplingConfig.title: Static Sampling Configuration
staticSamplingConfig.description: Configuration for static sampling based on table row count.

profileSample.description: Percentage of data or no. of rows used to compute the profiler metrics and run data quality tests
profileSample.title: Profile Sample

dynamicSamplingConfig.title: Dynamic Sampling Configuration
dynamicSamplingConfig.description: Configuration for dynamic sampling based on table row count.

thresholds.description: Row count thresholds for sampling. Evaluated in order from highest to lowest threshold. Tables below the lowest threshold are profiled at 100% (no sampling).

rowCountThreshold.description: Minimum row count for this tier to apply
rowCountThreshold.title: Row Count Threshold

profileSample.description: Sample percentage or row count to use for tables at or above this threshold
profileSample.title: Profile Sample

profileSampleConfig.description: Profile sample configuration supporting static and dynamic sampling strategies.

sampleConfigType.description: Type of sampling to apply. STATIC: fixed sample size. DYNAMIC: sample size determined at runtime based on row count thresholds.
